xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #1

plan.title: Hardening: workflow driver bundle import graph (post runtime-shim)

narratives.Description: Hardening: workflow driver bundle import graph (post runtime-shim)
narratives.Overview:
## Context

Durability backend Phases 0–3 landed on branch `deft/durability-backend` (tip: `1ee8c77`). Integration tests were failing during workflow global setup because the driver bundle graph statically imported `#internal/workflow/runtime.js` → `@workflow/core/runtime`, which pulls Node.js builtins into the neutral VM graph.

**Fix shipped:** `workflow-runtime-shim.ts` + `createEvePackageImportsPlugin` aliases `#compiled/@workflow/core/runtime.js` and `#internal/workflow/runtime.js` to the shim when `workflowCondition: true`.

This issue tracks **optional hardening** to reduce reliance on the shim and prevent regressions.

## Hardening items

### 1. Import hygiene in workflow body graph

Avoid static `#internal/workflow/runtime` imports in modules that end up in the workflow **driver** bundle. Prefer dynamic import inside `"use step"` handlers (pattern already used in `vercel-inbox.ts`, `dispatch-runtime-actions-step.ts`).

**Goal:** shrink the static import graph so driver bundles never reach `@workflow/core/runtime` without an explicit shim.

### 2. Exclude test files from workflow input collection

`collectWorkflowInputFiles` should skip `*.test.ts` under `src/execution/` (and similar) so unit tests never become workflow bundle entrypoints.

### 3. Keep integration tests under `test/`

Maintain `*.integration.test.ts` under `packages/eve/test/`, not `src/execution/`, to avoid accidental inclusion in workflow bundling scans.

### 4. Unit test for shim aliasing

Add a unit test asserting `createEvePackageImportsPlugin` aliases `#internal/workflow/runtime.js` (and `#compiled/@workflow/core/runtime.js`) to `workflow-runtime-shim.ts` when `workflowCondition: true`.

### 5. Deferred: in-memory channel `Runtime`

v1 compiles `experimental.durability.backend: inMemory()` but throws at runtime (`createInMemoryRuntime()` not implemented). Track as a separate story when we want local/dev channel execution without Vercel Workflow.

### 6. Session driver integration coverage

`session-driver.ts` is covered by unit tests with mocks; no integration test exercises the full driver path through workflow global setup. Consider a narrow integration test once import graph is stable.

## Acceptance signals

- [ ] Driver bundle build succeeds without shim **or** shim remains with documented invariant + regression test (item 4)
- [ ] `pnpm test:integration` passes in CI without new Node builtin leaks
- [ ] No `*.test.ts` files in `collectWorkflowInputFiles` output for execution modules

## References

- Branch: `deft/durability-backend`
- Shim: `packages/eve/src/internal/workflow-bundle/workflow-runtime-shim.ts`
- Plugin: `packages/eve/src/internal/workflow-bundle/builder-support.ts` (`createEvePackageImportsPlugin`)
- Research: `research/durability-backend.md`

items.title: Driver bundle build succeeds without shim **or** shim remains with documented invariant + regression test (item 4)
`pnpm test:integration` passes in CI without new Node builtin leaks
